title: Lycheetah Framework Claims Register
description: Schema for the machine-readable canonical claims register (D-1.0). Every load-bearing claim in the Lycheetah Framework canonical body C-1.0.

version.description: Defense protocol version this register belongs to

defends.description: Canonical body version this register defends

generated.description: ISO 8601 date this file was generated

total_claims.description: Total number of claim records (including retracted)

claim_id.description: Unique identifier in format FRAMEWORK-NNN (e.g., CAS-001)

framework.description: The framework this claim belongs to

status.description: Original status from PROVENANCE_INDEX (ACTIVE, SCAFFOLD, ASPIRATIONAL, OBSERVATIONAL, EMPIRICAL, FORMAL, REMOVED)

status_normalized.description: Normalized three-tier status for machine querying. ACTIVE=proven+computable, SCAFFOLD=structurally sound with named gaps, CONJECTURE=unproven worth exploring, RETRACTED=withdrawn

load_bearing.description: True if this is a primary load-bearing claim per PROVENANCE_INDEX. False for supporting/contextual claims.

evidence_path.description: Relative path(s) to source file(s) within CODEX_AURA_PRIME

pdf_page_est.description: Estimated page range in A SOVEREIGN SYSTEM FOR HUMAN-AI CO-CREATION-merged.pdf

falsifiability.description: Brief falsifiability statement. Full protocol in 28_DEFENSE/FALSIFICATION_REGISTER.md and 28_DEFENSE/TESTABILITY_MANIFEST.md

alchemical_name.description: Alchemical term that names this claim or its operational context, if applicable

formal_name.description: Formal or technical name for this claim (theorem ID, formula name, etc.)

prior_art_supersedes.description: Prior work this claim advances beyond. Full treatment in 28_DEFENSE/NOVEL_CONTRIBUTIONS.md

novelty.description: What this claim provides that prior art does not. Full treatment in 28_DEFENSE/NOVEL_CONTRIBUTIONS.md
